title: Following the Yamnaya Trail into India - David Reich
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews David Reich about the Yamnaya people and their migrations into India, tracing genetic ancestry patterns. This covers historical population genetics and archaeological findings rather than AI industry topics.
